summary: Frontend Playwright testing for marmar_arte single-page site. Exercised hero/navbar, all nav scroll links, Instagram external links, gallery category filtering (all/landscape/mythical/floral/portrait counts), pricing card rendering (PLN+EUR, featured 50×50 = 900 zł hit badge), and Contact form happy path + empty validation. All 26 assertions passed.

issues: React DEV hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — caused by Emergent visual-editor instrumentation injecting a span inside <option> elements (Contact.jsx line 107 size-select options). Source code is correct; warning is dev-mode-only and does not affect functionality, but pollutes console.

critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly with /api prefix — good.
Components are small and focused (<150 lines each) — good separation.
All interactive elements consistently use kebab-case data-testid — excellent testability.
Hero image uses an external pexels URL — verify rights/licensing for production (informational, not a bug).

success_rate.backend: N/A (backend not tested in this iteration)

seed_data_creation: Contact form POST created one DB record with name='TEST Auto Tester', contact='test@example.com', message='Auto test message'. Cleanup not performed (no DELETE endpoint exercised).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully functional. All flows tested via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Gallery filter counts confirmed: all=10, landscape=4, mythical=2, floral=3, portrait=1. Featured pricing card is price-card-4 (50×50 см, 900 zł, ≈209 €, 'хит' badge). Contact form posts to /api/contact and shows contact-success state. Only console noise is a dev-mode React hydration warning from visual-editor span injection inside <option> tags — safe to ignore.
